title: Silky Nostalgic Vegan Ukrainian Baby Squid Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly and nostalgic take on a traditional Ukrainian dish featuring baby squid, with a touch of sourness to give it a unique twist.

ingredients.name: Baby Squid
ingredients.notes: Ensure squid is fully cooked before serving

ingredients.name: Sour Cherry Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Chopped for a vibrant contrast to the silky sauce

ingredients.name: Chopped Red Bell Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use sweet varieties for a better taste in the dish

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: To balance the sourness of cherry tomatoes

ingredients.name: Water or Vegetable Stock
ingredients.notes: As a base for the sauce, reduce to half as needed

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and red bell pepper, sautéing for about 2 minutes until the vegetables soften.
Increase heat to high, add squid chunks followed by sour cherry tomatoes. Stir-fry for another 3-5 minutes until squid turns opaque and slightly golden.
Reduce remaining liquid in a saucepan with Worcestershire Sauce, soy sauce, and water or vegetable stock. Let it simmer and thicken to create the silky sauce.
Pour the sauce over the stir-fried squid mixture, tossing continuously for 1-2 minutes to coat the squid evenly.
Stir in chopped fresh basil leaves and serve hot with extra red bell pepper strips on top if desired.
